zh-CN.name: 数字13
zh-CN.intro: 数字13是比12多一的数字。它由一个十和一个三组成，是两位数哦！

story.title: 🍪13块饼干
story.body: 小猴子做了13块饼干，准备分给朋友们。它数了数：1、2、3...10，然后再数11、12、13！13块饼干不多不少。小兔子说：“我闻到香味啦！”小猴子把饼干摆在盘子里，分给每个小动物一块。大家开心地吃着，都说：“13块饼干真好吃！”小猴子发现，13虽然是个大数字，但只要认真数，就能数清楚。剩下最后一块，它留给了最小的蚂蚁，蚂蚁高兴极了！

knowledge.title: 13为什么是两位数？
knowledge.body: 13是由一个十和一个三组成的。十位是1，个位是3，所以它是两位数。两位数都比一位数大。

en.name: Thirteen
en.intro: Thirteen is one more than twelve. It has a ten and a three. It is a two-digit number!

story.title: 🍪Thirteen Cookies
story.body: Little monkey baked thirteen cookies to share with friends. He counted: 1, 2, 3...10, then 11, 12, 13! Exactly thirteen cookies. Rabbit said, “I smell something yummy!” Monkey put the cookies on a plate and gave one to each animal. They ate happily, saying, “Thirteen cookies are so good!” Monkey saw that thirteen is a big number, but you can count it carefully. He saved the last cookie for the tiniest ant, and ant was so happy!

knowledge.title: Why is thirteen a two-digit number?
knowledge.body: Thirteen is made of one ten and three ones. The tens place is 1, the ones place is 3, so it is a two-digit number. Two-digit numbers are bigger than one-digit numbers.
